lines.speaker: Lofu
lines.text: You're one of those humans that everybody has been talking about! The Marimbo Guard will kill you on the spot!

lines.speaker: Lofu
lines.text: Get out of my way, you fool! Can't you see I'm busy?

lines.speaker: Lofu
lines.text: Monkeys these days... you'll be acting like one of those awful Gnomes next...
